title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 544.130 - Attempted escape, proceeding after arrest
text:
544.130.  Attempted escape, proceeding after arrest. — When any person shall be so pursued and arrested, he shall be immediately taken before some associate circuit judge authorized to act under the provisions of this chapter, who shall proceed thereon in the same manner as if the prisoner had been arrested on a warrant.
(RSMo 1939 § 3883) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3493; 1919 § 3838; 1909 § 5046
